name: Sarah Johnson
subject: Custom Order Request
message: Hi Meg! I'd love a custom crewneck with my dog's name embroidered on it. His name is Biscuit and I'd love it in a sage green color with wildflowers around the name. Size medium please!

name: Emily Chen
subject: Custom Order Request
message: I'm looking for 6 matching tote bags for my bridesmaids! Each with their name and a floral design. Wedding is May 15th. Is that enough time?
notes: Quoted $180 for set of 6. Waiting for confirmation.

name: Mike Torres
subject: General Inquiry
message: Do you ship internationally? I'm in Canada and want to order a couple glass cups for my wife.
